name: Cheese and Pasta Pie
recipeIngredient: 1 10-oz. package frozen chopped spinach, cooked and drained
vegetable cooking spray to coat baking dish
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Combine noodles, oil, and two beaten eggs. Press on the bottom and up the sides of a prepared 10-inch quiche or pie plate. Cover edge of pasta with greased foil; bake 7-10 minutes or until set.
3. In a medium bowl, mix together spinach, onion, parsley, and basil.
4. In a large bowl, beat together ricotta, four eggs, and milk; add one-half cup mozzarella; stir in spinach mixture, Worcestershire sauce, salt, pepper, and Parmesan.
5. Spoon filling into pasta shell; sprinkle remaining mozzarella on top. If desired, lay whole green onions atop also.
6. Bake for 30-35 minutes or until a knife inserted near the center comes out clean. Let stand 10 minutes before serving.
